workflow_runs.name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
workflow_runs.display_title: feat: AI multi-round conversation with different models per round

head_commit.message:
feat: AI multi-round conversation with different models per round

- Reduce cooldown from 90min to 10min for livelier chat
- Loop up to AI_MAX_ROUNDS (3) messages per invocation when no users
- Single round (1) when responding to user messages
- Each round picks a different model from the shuffled free-model list
- Between rounds, inject a lightweight user prompt so the next model
  sees valid user/assistant alternation
- callOpenRouter returns { content, model } so used models are tracked

feat: distinguish own messages with right-aligned red bubbles, remove all CubeX AI branding

- Generate persistent user ID via localStorage so same browser = same identity
- Own messages now right-aligned with red-tinted bubble; others stay left-aligned
- Remove "CubeX AI" from both UI text and AI system prompt
